requirements.task_name: Book the cheapest weekend chalet with a hot tub under $250/night within 5 km of the ski lifts
requirements.task_description: Find chalets for a specific weekend, filter for 4 adults, hot tub amenity, max $250 per night, and within 5 km of the ski lifts, then start a booking on the cheapest option.

required_variables.set_condition: Each time getChaletBookingFormData is called and a valid chalet is found (chalet != null) and both checkIn and checkOut are provided.
required_variables.value_to_set: An object like { chalet_id: chalet.id, check_in: checkIn, check_out: checkOut, adults, children, pets: petsCount || 0, opened_at: new Date().toISOString() }
required_variables.reason: Records exactly which chalet and stay parameters were used when the user entered the booking form. The evaluator can then: (1) confirm the dates match the required weekend, (2) confirm 4 adults, 0 children, (3) confirm the chalet has hot tub amenity and is within 5 km of the lifts, (4) compute the nightly price to check it is under $250, and (5) determine from 'chalets' which qualifying chalet is cheapest and ensure the booked one matches.

requirements.task_name: Compare two similarly priced chalets and favorite the one with the higher rating
requirements.task_description: Search for chalets for a given date range, identify two chalets priced between $180 and $220 per night, compare their star ratings, and add the higher-rated one to your favorites list.

required_variables.set_condition: Whenever getChaletDetails is called and returns a non-null chalet. On each call, read the existing array from localStorage (or start with an empty array), append or update an entry for this chalet_id, then write back.
required_variables.value_to_set: An array of simple records, e.g. [{ chalet_id, check_in: checkIn || null, check_out: checkOut || null, adults: adults || null, children: children || null, viewed_at: new Date().toISOString() }, ...]. If the same chalet is viewed multiple times, either append another record or update the last one; the evaluator only needs to know which unique chalets were compared and what date range (if any) was used.
required_variables.reason: Lets the evaluator see which chalets were actually compared. Using 'chalets' and these IDs, the evaluator can verify that at least two compared chalets are priced between $180 and $220 per night and can cross-check dates if the UI passes them.

required_variables.set_condition: When toggleFavoriteChalet adds a new favorite (i.e., existingIndex === -1 and a new favorite is pushed), set this variable to the chaletId for which is_favorited has just become true.
required_variables.value_to_set: The chaletId argument passed into toggleFavoriteChalet.
required_variables.reason: Identifies which chalet the user explicitly chose as favorite during this flow. Combined with 'task2_comparedChalets' and chalet rating/review data from 'chalets', the evaluator can confirm that the chosen favorite was among the compared chalets and had the highest rating (or, in case of a tie, more reviews).

requirements.task_name: Book a 5-night pet-friendly family chalet with sauna and 3+ bedrooms under $2000 total
requirements.task_description: Search for a 5-night stay for 6 adults and 2 children in a pet-friendly chalet with at least 3 bedrooms and a sauna, making sure the total stay cost shown is under $2000, then proceed to the booking summary.

required_variables.set_condition: Whenever getBookingReview is called and finds a booking (booking != null).
required_variables.value_to_set: An object such as { booking_id: bookingId, opened_at: new Date().toISOString() }.
required_variables.reason: Confirms that the user actually navigated to the booking summary/review page for a real booking. Using 'bookings' and 'chalets', the evaluator can then validate that this booking is for a 5-night stay, 6 adults and 2 children, pet-friendly chalet with sauna and at least 3 bedrooms, and grand_total < $2000.

requirements.task_name: Create a 3-day grocery delivery order with 5 specific food items for chalet fridge stocking
requirements.task_description: Use the e-store to add exactly 5 food items: 2 breakfast items under $8 each, 2 dinner mains between $10 and $20 each, and 1 snack with rating 4.5+ stars, then choose 'Chalet fridge stocking' delivery and select chalet and date.

requirements.task_name: Assemble a winter gear bundle with free shipping, 4.5+ rating, and total under $180
requirements.task_description: Buy one pair of ski gloves, one beanie, and one set of thermal socks from the e-store, each with rating 4.5+ stars, all marked with free shipping, and keep the combined subtotal under $180, preferring blue color when available.

requirements.task_name: Order a fireplace and game night package for your chalet stay
requirements.task_description: Create an order that includes 2 packs of firewood, 1 box of matches, 3 candles, and 2 different board games (one suitable for 2–4 players and one for 4–8 players), then select 'Deliver to chalet' and set a delivery date matching your check-in.

requirements.task_name: Purchase two digital chalet gift vouchers with specific values and a custom message
requirements.task_description: Use the e-store to buy one $100 and one $50 digital gift voucher, choose email delivery (within the site), and add the same personalized message to both before proceeding to the payment page.

required_variables.set_condition: Whenever getPaymentMethods is called (regardless of orderId), set/update this variable.
required_variables.value_to_set: An object such as { order_id: orderId, opened_at: new Date().toISOString() }.
required_variables.reason: Marks that the user has progressed to the payment-method selection step for a specific order. Using 'orders' and 'order_items', the evaluator can then verify that this order contains exactly two digital gift cards (one $100, one $50) with the correct recipient emails and identical message, and that the purchaser_email is 'buyer@example.com'.

requirements.task_name: Add stay extras to an existing chalet booking while keeping add-ons under $120 per adult
requirements.task_description: Use the 'Manage booking' section to open an existing booking, then add airport transfer, daily breakfast, and late checkout extras for 2 adults while keeping the total cost of add-ons under $240 (i.e., $120 per adult).
